name: I hurt my back at work today in Salt Lake City, what do I do right now?
description: Report to your supervisor now in writing, seek medical care, and call a workers' comp lawyer today to protect your Utah claim.

mainEntity.name: I hurt my back at work today in Salt Lake City, what do I do right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to your supervisor now in writing, seek medical care, and call a workers' comp lawyer today to protect your Utah claim.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Report the injury to your supervisor immediately, ideally in writing.**

Utah workers' compensation requires prompt notice to preserve your claim; delays can lead to denial.[1] Seek medical attention to document the injury linking it to work.

- Get treated at an approved provider or ER if severe.
- Request an incident report form from HR.
- Avoid signing any statements without advice.

Contact a workers' comp attorney within days to file properly; carriers often deny back claims aggressively.[1] Free consultations help navigate this.
